[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100101 4
1 10100010 3
2 10011010 4
3 01000000 1
4 11010000 3
5 10001000 2
6 00010100 2
7 10010000 2

71 17 10000001 2

36 63 10010011 4

61 16 01000000 1 match 3
72 27 11010000 3 match 4
